theme: relief supplies distributed before market day
title: Relief Bazaar: Endowments Before the Trading Rounds
strategies: uniform/proportional split reference, no trading foresight
myopic per-household marginal-utility greedy: ignores the trade network and the geometric-mean objective entirely

community-aggregate water-filling: routes each good by aggregate community demand, then hands out an oblivious round-robin split within each community, trusting the friction-limited replay to polish it toward a good fixpoint for free
